recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: Pod
recommendations.overview: A family intervention goes horrifically awry within the snowy confines of an isolated lake house.

recommendations.title: Caveat
recommendations.overview: A lone drifter suffering from partial memory loss accepts a job to look after a psychologically troubled woman in an abandoned house on an isolated island.

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.

recommendations.title: Finders Keepers
recommendations.overview: A haunted doll teaches one little girl why children shouldn't play with undead things.

recommendations.title: I Am the Pretty Thing That Lives in the House
recommendations.overview: A young nurse takes care of an elderly author who lives in a haunted house.

recommendations.title: The Innocents
recommendations.overview: A young governess for two children becomes convinced that the house and grounds are haunted by ghosts and that the children are being possessed.

recommendations.title: Oddity
recommendations.overview: After the brutal murder of her twin sister, Darcy goes after those responsible by using haunted items as her tools for revenge.

recommendations.title: The Little Stranger
recommendations.overview: In a dusty post-war summer in rural Warwickshire, a doctor is called to a patient at lonely Hundreds Hall. Home to the Ayres family for over two centuries, the Georgian house is now in decline. But are the Ayreses haunted by something more sinister t

recommendations.title: The Railway Children Return
recommendations.overview: Follow a group of children who are evacuated to a Yorkshire village during the Second World War, where they encounter a young soldier who, like them, is far away from home.
